main.description: A block of markdown text with metadata about its flavor and renderer. Owned by markpub.at (https://markpub.at) — this file is a local mirror for documentation/types, not an authored lexicon. Designed as an embedded object, not a record; Requested embeds it as fyi.requested.documentVersion.content.

text.description: The markdown text (and any optional rich-text facets).

renderingRules.description: The renderer the author expects. Consumers may honor it but are not obligated to. Requested writes 'marked'.

frontMatter.description: Optional parsed front matter, when separated out of the raw markdown.
